question: How many video games have global sales above the overall average and were released in the year -2013?
sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?videogame) AS ?count)  FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/video-games>
WHERE { { SELECT (AVG(?global_sales) AS ?average_global_sales) WHERE { ?videogame_all <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/types/VideoGame> . ?videogame_all <https://omnix.dev/types/VideoGame/attrs/global_sales> ?global_sales . } } ?videogame <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/types/VideoGame> . ?videogame <https://omnix.dev/types/VideoGame/attrs/global_sales> ?videogame_global_sales . ?videogame <https://omnix.dev/types/VideoGame/attrs/year> ?year . FILTER (?videogame_global_sales > ?average_global_sales && ?year = -2013) }

question: Which platform has the highest total global sales for games in the 'Action' genre?
sparql:

WHERE { ?vg <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/types/VideoGame> . ?vg <https://omnix.dev/types/VideoGame/attrs/global_sales> ?global_sales . ?vg <https://omnix.dev/onto/genre> ?genre . ?genre <https://omnix.dev/types/Genre/attrs/name> ?genre_name . ?vg <https://omnix.dev/onto/platform> ?platform . ?platform <https://omnix.dev/types/Platform/attrs/name> ?platform_name . FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(?genre_name), LCASE("Action"))) } GROUP BY ?platform_name ORDER BY DESC(?total_global_sales) LIMIT 1

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?medalRecord) AS ?numberOfMedals)  FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/olympics-2024>
WHERE { ?medalRecord <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/types/MedalRecord> . ?medalRecord <https://omnix.dev/onto/event> ?event . ?event <https://omnix.dev/types/Event/attrs/name> ?eventName . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?eventName), "women")) . }

question: What is the distribution of medal types for athletes from China who won medals in Athletics?
sparql:
SELECT (SAMPLE(?medalTypeName) AS ?medalType) (COUNT(?medalRecord) AS ?count)  FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/olympics-2024>
WHERE { ?medalRecord <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/types/MedalRecord> . ?medalRecord <https://omnix.dev/onto/country> ?country . ?country <https://omnix.dev/types/Country/attrs/name> ?countryName . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?countryName), "china")) . ?medalRecord <https://omnix.dev/onto/discipline> ?eventCategory . ?eventCategory <https://omnix.dev/types/EventCategory/attrs/name> ?eventCategoryName . FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?eventCategoryName), "athletics")) . ?medalRecord <https://omnix.dev/onto/medal_type> ?medalTypeEntity . ?medalTypeEntity <https://omnix.dev/types/Medal/attrs/name> ?medalTypeName . } GROUP BY ?medalTypeEntity ORDER BY ?medalType

question: How many exoplanets discovered before 2000 have a star mass greater than 1 solar mass?
sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?exoplanet) AS ?count)  FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/exoplanets>
WHERE { ?exoplanet <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/types/Exoplanet> . ?exoplanet <https://omnix.dev/types/Exoplanet/attrs/discovery_year> ?discoveryYear . FILTER (?discoveryYear < 2000) . ?exoplanet <https://omnix.dev/types/Exoplanet/attrs/star_mass_solar> ?starMassSolar . FILTER (?starMassSolar > 1) }

question: How many complaints with the Tag 'Older American' were submitted via Web and have a Company public response?

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?complaint) AS ?complaintCount)  FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/cfpb-complaints>
WHERE { ?complaint <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/types/ConsumerComplaint> . ?complaint <https://omnix.dev/types/ConsumerComplaint/attrs/tags> ?tag . FILTER(LCASE(?tag) = "older american") . ?complaint <https://omnix.dev/onto/submitted_via> ?submissionMethod . ?submissionMethod <https://omnix.dev/types/SubmissionMethod/attrs/name> ?submissionMethodName . FILTER(LCASE(?submissionMethodName) = "web") . ?complaint <https://omnix.dev/types/ConsumerComplaint/attrs/company_public_response> ?companyPublicResponse . }

question: What is the average number of medals per country, considering only countries with more than 50 medals?
sparql:
SELECT (AVG(?medalCount) AS ?averageMedalsPerCountry)  FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/olympics-2024>
WHERE { { SELECT ?country (COUNT(?medalRecord) AS ?medalCount) WHERE { ?medalRecord <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/types/MedalRecord> . ?medalRecord <https://omnix.dev/onto/country> ?country . } GROUP BY ?country HAVING (COUNT(?medalRecord) > 50) } }

question: Which director has the highest average Meta_score among directors with at least 5 movies?
sparql:
SELECT ?director_name (AVG(?meta_score) AS ?average_meta_score)  FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/imdb-movies>
WHERE { ?movie <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/types/Movie> . ?movie <https://omnix.dev/onto/director> ?director . ?director <https://omnix.dev/types/Person/attrs/name> ?director_name . OPTIONAL { ?movie <https://omnix.dev/types/Movie/attrs/meta_score> ?meta_score . } } GROUP BY ?director_name HAVING (COUNT(?movie) >= 5) ORDER BY DESC(?average_meta_score) LIMIT 1
